ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "purity" TEXT /* Purity of the product */,
  "product_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the product */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the product */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the product */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Overall diameter of the product */,
  "inside_diameter" REAL /* Inside diameter of the product */,
  "outside_diameter" REAL /* Outside diameter of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category of the product */,
  "bottom_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the bottom section */,
  "top_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the top section */,
  "orientation_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the orientation */,
  "polish" TEXT /* Polish state of the product */,
  "surface_finish" TEXT /* Surface finish specifications */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Detailed composition of the material */,
  "production_lot" TEXT /* Batch or lot number for traceability */,
  "manufacturing_process" TEXT /* Method used in manufacturing */,
  "date_manufactured" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any certifications or compliance standards the product meets */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each product unit */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the product */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing batch */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product manufactured */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when quality checks were performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Total quantity produced in this batch */,
  "defects_reported" INTEGER /* Number of defects reported during quality checks */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the batch */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Line or machine used for production */,
  "batch_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the batch */,
  "raw_materials" TEXT /* List of raw materials used in the batch */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during production */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during production (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_batches_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_batches_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., raw materials, equipment) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "delivery_lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery in days */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Supplier reliability score (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "preferred_supplier" INTEGER /* Whether the supplier is preferred */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for reordering */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "last_inspected_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  "location" TEXT /* Storage location within the warehouse */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for inventory tracking */,
  "storage_temperature" TEXT /* Recommended storage temperature */,
  "storage_humidity" TEXT /* Recommended storage humidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing batch */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or findings from the quality check */,
  "check_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who performed the check */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the quality check */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the check */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the check */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, production, quality control) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Completed) */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_instructions" TEXT /* Any special shipping instructions */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_info" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used (e.g., Ground, Air) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Whether a signature is required for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_info_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sales_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_reports" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect reported */,
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality check that reported the defect */,
  "defect_type" TEXT /* Type of defect identified (e.g., Dimensional, Surface Finish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was reported */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect resolution (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "defect_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "defect_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost to fix the defect */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the defect */,
  "corrective_action" TEXT /* Corrective action taken to resolve the defect */,
  "preventive_action" TEXT /* Preventive action to avoid future defects */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Whether a retest is required after resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_reports_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES quality_checks ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
